docs.title: Can I Cancel at Any Time & How Do I Cancel?
Cancel Your EliteAlgo Membership Anytime
docs.text: Yes, you can cancel your EliteAlgo membership at any time.

docs.title: How to Cancel
docs.text: Cancel in one click from the Portal at portal.elitesignals.com. Sign in, go to Settings → Billing, and click cancel. That's it.

docs.title: Processing Time
docs.text:
Cancellations made through the Portal are processed instantly. Your subscription is cancelled (or scheduled to end at the close of your current billing period) the moment you confirm.

We recommend cancelling before your next renewal date to avoid being charged for the next billing cycle.

If you need any further assistance, don't hesitate to reach out at support@elitesignals.com. We're here to help!

docs.title: Can I Use EliteAlgo on MetaTrader or Other Platforms?
EliteAlgo on TradingView
docs.text:
No, EliteAlgo is only hosted on TradingView.com. Most users take the insights from EliteAlgo and use their existing brokers to place their trades.

TradingView is the #1 charting platform in the world, and we highly recommend it to all of our members. With world-class tools and a platform that is miles ahead of its competitors, TradingView is the perfect host for EliteAlgo, which is why we've chosen it exclusively.

docs.title: Do I Need a TradingView Account to Use EliteAlgo?
EliteAlgo on TradingView
docs.text: EliteAlgo is exclusively hosted on TradingView.com and the Chartlabs.co charting platforms.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: If you don't already have a TradingView account, simply visit TradingView.com and create one. Once you're set up, you can sign up for EliteAlgo to enhance your trading experience.

docs.title: Do I Need TradingView Pro to Use EliteAlgo?
EliteAlgo and TradingView
docs.text:
No need to upgrade — EliteAlgo works perfectly with the free version of TradingView.

The paid versions of TradingView offer additional features, such as:

  • Setting alerts
  • Using more than 3 indicators on one chart
  • Accessing smaller timeframes
  • And other premium features

However, the free version does not affect the performance of EliteAlgo in any way. You can use it to its full potential without any issues.

docs.title: EliteAlgo Signals: No Repainting
docs.text: EliteAlgo signals do not repaint. They are generated in real-time and confirmed only when the candle closes, ensuring accuracy and reliability.

docs.title: What is Repainting?
docs.text: Repainting occurs when signals are adjusted based on future data, making them appear differently than how they originally were. With EliteAlgo, you can trust that what you see is what you get.

docs.title: See EliteAlgo in Action
docs.text: You can watch EliteAlgo's signals in action on our 24/7 live stream by clicking here: Livestream

docs.title: Do You Offer a Free Trial for EliteAlgo?
EliteAlgo Membership and Fees
docs.text:
We do not offer a trial period for EliteAlgo. However, our memberships are flexible with no hidden fees. You can cancel at any time without incurring any charges, and if you need to put your account on hold, it's completely free.

The fees we collect for the EliteAlgo membership are dedicated to research & development, creating innovative tools, paying vendors, and supporting our team. We currently employ 30 professional analysts, editors, coders, and several support staff to ensure the best service possible.

Our commitment is to provide you with top-tier service at the most affordable price.

docs.title: Get Started with Discord
docs.text:
Click this link or visit discord.com for simple instructions to download the free app on your desktop and/or mobile device.

Discord is completely free to use!

docs.title: How Long Does It Take to Get Access After Purchasing?
Activation Process for EliteAlgo
docs.text:
All activations are processed automatically and typically take just a few minutes. However, in rare cases, manual activation may be required and that can take up to 10 hours or more.

Start here for activation: https://elitesignals.com/tv-access

Then watch the EliteAlgo course and familiarize yourself with the setup.

Info

We kindly ask that you not spam the chats, support email, or the admins while we work to complete your activation. It only slows down the process.

  • You can watch the EliteAlgo course here
  • Click here to join our Discord community. This is where you will receive access to the daily signals from our 20 analysts and the premium chatrooms.

TradingView is where you will access the EliteAlgo toolkit. You do not need to pay for TradingView to use EliteAlgo.

docs.title: 1. Visit Our Website
docs.text: Go to elitesignals.com.

docs.title: 2. Choose a Plan
docs.text:
Select the Starter plan or the Advanced plan. Both plans include EliteAlgo. The Advanced plan also includes premium access to ChartLabs, and the expanded EliteAlgo toolkit.

  • Both plans are currently offered for just $1 for the first 30 days.
  • You can also opt for Yearly Access: Full access for a year, starting anytime.
  • You can also opt for Lifetime Access: Permanent access to EliteAlgo and the Elite Signals community, including all future updates, early feature previews, and beta testing opportunities.

docs.title: 3. Complete Your Signup
docs.text:
After signing up, you'll receive an "Order Confirmation" with instructions. Please check that it did not go to your spam folder before reaching out. You will also be redirected to this page: https://elitesignals.com/tv-access

The access is automated. Please follow the instructions to get instant access.

docs.title: 4. Activation
docs.text:
This is instantly granted once our system verifies your order details (1-2 minutes).

Note

Need help? Do not spam us. Send 1 email to support@elitesignals.com and our team will get back to you ASAP.

docs.title: 5. Troubleshooting
docs.text:
If you provided an incorrect username or don't see access reflected after following the instructions, contact our Admin team via:

  • Email: support@elitesignals.com
  • Live Chat on our website

docs.title: Accessing EliteAlgo Invite-Only Scripts
docs.text: The invite-only scripts will appear after you have signed up and followed the instructions here: https://elitesignals.com/tv-access

docs.title: How to Access
docs.text:
1. Refresh the page after completing the steps.
  2. If you don't see the scripts or you provided the wrong TradingView username, please reach out to support@elitesignals.com and give them 12 hours to respond.

docs.title: Is EliteAlgo Beginner Friendly?
docs.text: Yes, EliteAlgo is beginner-friendly. It comes with an included course that walks you through how to use it properly, covering all of its features.

docs.title: Free EliteAlgo Course
docs.text: Get started by watching our free course:

docs.title: What Markets & Timeframes Does EliteAlgo Work On?
EliteAlgo: Versatile for Any Market
docs.text:
EliteAlgo is designed to work seamlessly across all international markets, including:

  • Stocks
  • Options
  • Indices
  • Forex
  • Crypto Trading
  • Futures
  • Commodities

It supports all timeframes, ranging from as low as 1 minute to as long as 1 week. Whether you're using TradingView for charting, EliteAlgo can assist you in making informed decisions for various strategies like:

  • Scalping
  • Swing-Trading
  • Intraday Trading

docs.title: Built-In Features for Enhanced Trading
docs.text:
EliteAlgo comes packed with powerful, built-in features, including:

  • Take Profit & Stop Loss Suggestions
  • Auto Support & Resistance Detection
  • Informational Dashboard
  • And much more...

EliteAlgo can be easily integrated into your current trading strategy, providing strong confirmation and improving your win-rate by helping you make data-driven decisions.

docs.title: Refund Policy
docs.text: At Elite Signals, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional service and premium-quality products to our valued customers.

docs.title: Duplicate Payments
docs.text: In the event of a duplicate payment for an EliteAlgo membership, we will promptly refund the additional charge. To initiate the refund process, please reach out to our support team at support@elitesignals.com with evidence of the duplicate transaction.

docs.title: Refunds
docs.text: Refunds for EliteAlgo memberships are available in the case of duplicate payments. If you have questions about your subscription, please contact support@elitesignals.com.

docs.title: Cancellation
docs.text: You can cancel your EliteAlgo subscription at any time before the next renewal date in one click via the Portal at portal.elitesignals.com. Cancellations are processed instantly.

docs.title: Refund Requests
docs.text: Each Elite X purchase includes a lifetime license. Because of this, refunds are generally not available. However, our goal is to ensure you get the most value from Elite X, which is why we provide full setup guidance and ongoing support. For help, please contact our support team at support@elitesignals.com.

docs.title: Need Assistance?
docs.text: For any questions or support regarding refunds, cancellations, or other inquiries, feel free to email us at support@elitesignals.com or connect with us via the live chat feature on our website. We're here to help!

docs.title: What Do I Need to Use EliteAlgo?
To Use EliteAlgo, You'll Need:
docs.text:
• A free account with TradingView.com
  • A broker to execute trades (e.g., Robinhood, Webull, MT4)
  • An active membership with Elite Signals

docs.title: Elevate Your Trading with Elite Signals
docs.text: At Elite Signals, our team of seasoned experts has developed cutting-edge trading indicators to empower traders with a fresh perspective and a robust toolkit. Whether you're a seasoned professional or just beginning your trading journey, we've got everything you need to succeed.

docs.title: EliteAlgo Premium Suite
docs.text:
Our EliteAlgo Premium suite is an all-in-one powerhouse on TradingView, featuring two additional indicators packed with dozens of advanced features for technical analysis. This comprehensive toolkit equips you with:

  • Real-time signals
  • Candle coloring
  • Dashboard analytics
  • Automated alerts
  • Customizable settings
  • Support and resistance levels
  • Institutional activity insights
  • And much more

Seamlessly switch between features and integrate them into your trading strategies — all accessible through our all-inclusive membership on the Elite Signals website.

docs.title: A Complete Experience on Discord
docs.text:
Beyond the tools, EliteAlgo offers a dynamic user experience on Discord. Join a thriving community of over 45,000 traders and unlock:

  • Thousands of real-time alerts across every market
  • Insights from 30 Expert Traders, employed as full-time analysts
  • Opportunities to learn, collaborate, and grow

We're dedicated to delivering a seamless trading experience designed for results.

docs.title: Empowering Your Trading Decisions
docs.text:
While no indicator or strategy can guarantee profits, our tools are built to maximize your potential. Our indicators are:

  • Fully interactive — Tailor them to your needs
  • Highly interoperable — Combine them effortlessly for a cohesive strategy
  • Supportive — Enhance your decision-making process

We rigorously test and develop strategies for our users to follow, ensuring you have reliable frameworks to build upon. At Elite Signals, we believe trading success stems from the synergy between the trader and our tools. Our indicators process vast amounts of data, delivering clear, actionable insights that go beyond what traders can achieve alone. Pair these with your expertise in market factors and money management, and the path to success becomes clear.

docs.title: Flexible Tools for Every Trader
docs.text:
We celebrate diverse trading styles. Our indicators provide a three-dimensional view of the market, offering flexibility to:

  • Use them as standalone tools
  • Combine them with other indicators
  • Adapt them to your unique approach

docs.title: Step Into the Future of Trading
docs.text: Ready to take your trading to new heights? Sign up for our all-inclusive membership today at Elite Signals and unlock a world of possibilities.

docs.title: What is EliteAlgo?
docs.text: EliteAlgo is an advanced proprietary algorithm that operates 24/7 within the TradingView charting platform. Designed for traders of all levels — beginners, intermediate, and advanced — it enhances trading strategies by providing actionable insights and robust tools.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
EliteAlgo improves trading outcomes with:

  • Buy & Sell Signals — Clear indicators to guide your trades
  • Stop Loss Suggestions — Minimize risk with strategic recommendations
  • Take Profit Zones — Optimize gains with targeted exit points
  • Auto Support & Resistance Plotting — Identify key levels effortlessly

docs.title: Community Experience on Discord
docs.text:
Beyond the algorithm, EliteAlgo offers a vibrant user experience on Discord. Join a massive community where you can:

  • Access thousands of real-time alerts across every market
  • Collaborate with traders to refine your skills
  • Learn, discuss ideas, and build connections

It's the perfect hub to make money, make friends, and master trading with EliteAlgo.

docs.title: Join Us
docs.text:
Ready to get started? Join the community today:

https://discord.gg/elitealgo

docs.title: What Is TradingView?
docs.text:
TradingView is a free charting platform and social network designed for traders and investors. It provides real-time financial charts and a wide array of tools to identify trading opportunities across multiple markets, including Stocks, Forex, Crypto, Futures, and Commodities.

TradingView is also the platform that powers our EliteAlgo trading system/indicator. To use EliteAlgo, you'll need a TradingView account — simply create one and provide your username when signing up for EliteAlgo.

docs.title: How to Create a TradingView Account
docs.text:
1. Visit the TradingView homepage.
  2. Click "Sign In" at the top right, then select "Sign Up".
  3. Register using your Google, Facebook, Twitter, or email account for a quick setup.

Alternatively, download the TradingView app on your mobile device and follow the same steps.

docs.title: Charting with TradingView
docs.text: To open a chart, log in and click "Chart" at the top left of the website.

docs.title: How to Change the Symbol
docs.text: Update the chart's symbol (e.g., stock or currency pair) by clicking the ticker in the top left corner and entering a new one.

docs.title: How to Change Your Timeframe
docs.text: Timeframes control how frequently new candles appear on the chart. Adjust this by clicking the timeframe option to the right of the ticker and selecting your preferred interval (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour, etc.).

docs.title: Why Join Discord for EliteAlgo?
docs.text:
EliteAlgo is just one piece of your membership. By joining our Discord community, you also gain access to:

  • Daily signals from professional analysts
  • Educational content to sharpen your skills
  • Direct support from our team
  • Weekly training sessions
  • A vibrant community of like-minded traders to share and discuss ideas

Discord brings all these benefits together, enhancing your EliteAlgo experience.
